LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JOE HOLT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. THE COURT WAITED UNTIL 9:45AM TO GIVE AN OPPORTUNITY FOR OPPOSING COUNSEL TO APPEAR AND CONTEST. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB/PM) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 * * * DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR, ATTORNEY MARK VOGT WAS NOT CONTACTED TELEPHONICALLY TO APPEAR TO ARGUE THIS MATTER. THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION, VACATES THE ABOVE RULING AND STRIKES THE FILING OF THE SIGNED ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND ORDERS THE MATTER RESTORED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON APRIL 25, 2007 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 301. MINUTE ORDER TO FOLLOW.

Defendant Joe Holt'S Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCE: Mark Vogt, Esq, Tel. No. (559)228-6700 appearing by telephone for the plaintiff;
ATTY. STEVEN KREMER, TEL. NO. 931-4207 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT JOE HOLT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/PM

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Steven Kremer, Esq., 415-931-4207 for defendant and moving party Joe Holt

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT JOE HOLT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. THE COURT WAITED UNTIL 9:45AM TO GIVE AN OPPORTUNITY FOR OPPOSING COUNSEL TO APPEAR AND CONTEST. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
* * * Due to clerical error, attorney MARK VOGT was not contacted telephonically to appear to argue this matter. The Court on its own motion, vacates the above ruling and strikes the filing of the signed ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT and orders the matter restored to calendar for hearing on April 25, 2007 at 9:30 am in Department 301. Minute Order to follow.
